title: Simply Glowing TFMG ores [Create]
description: A resource pack that makes the ores (lead, nickel, lithium) from Create: The Factory Must Grow simply glow and glint(animation). Support "Optifine" and "Continuity" Mod!
body:
**ORES GLOW ONLY IF HAVING ONE OF THESE THINGS INSTALLED:**

---

Optifine (Forge) or
Continuity (Fabric/Forge/NeoForge/Quilt)

The Resource pack relies on the Emissive properties of these. Without it the resource pack will work but no glowing and there will be only animated glint.

And of course you need Create mod and Create: The Factory Must Grow mod. (Textures from version 0.9.3)

## Showcase:
![glow&glint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3e90605ad89ee200ec2178c81b18fdf480dd644.gif)

(The animation on the showcase is looped with no pauses for lower GIF size)
